paper_title: Shell analyses Isotope data source and extraction

methods.description: This method involves extracting isotope data from figures in scientific articles using the PlotDigitizer tool. It is used to obtain numerical data from graphical representations when raw data is not provided.

steps.description: Extract stream water and shell isotope data from figures using PlotDigitizer.
steps.searchable_summary: use PlotDigitizer to extract numerical data from article figures

methods.description: This method involves extracting isotope data directly from tables provided in scientific articles. It is used when the data is presented in tabular form.

steps.description: Extract stream water and shell isotope data from tables in the articles.
steps.searchable_summary: extract numerical data from article tables
